slots.panel_1: Wait for rates to drop before buying
slots.panel_3: Every buyer in the state comes off the bench and the house you wanted has 9 offers by Sunday
slots.panel_4: Every buyer in the state comes off the bench and the house you wanted has 9 offers by Sunday

caption_draft.ig: Three of the offers are cash. Two are from people who sold in Austin. None of them are you.

calibration_notes: Specific rate move (0.25%), specific count (9 offers), specific deadline (Sunday). Gru format strength — panel 3 and 4 repeat is the realization that hits twice. Caption layers in the 2025-2026 phenomenon every agent recognizes: cash from Sun Belt sellers stacking the deck. 'None of them are you' is the kill shot. No moralizing, no 'so don't wait.'
